name: 1 Million Circles
description: 1 Million Circles are being drawn, streamed live on pumpfun. Users can burn the token and submit a claim on the website to receive their physical art counterpart, once the drawing has been completed. The work consists of 100 pages, 30"x42" in size, of unique and timeless pieces of art containing exactly 10,000 circles per sheet. The nature of the drawings ensure that the pages are able to be subdivided evenly and distributed around the world.
